text:
Hi users.
I need help installing android-build-tools on Mac. It keep saying I need JDK 17 or higher. I have 21, 22 installed. Running javac -version and java -version confirms the installation. I also asked on the forum but it seems it is not very active.
<https://forums.fusetools.com/t/android-build-tools-cant-find-jdk/8452/1|https://forums.fusetools.com/t/android-build-tools-cant-find-jdk/8452/1>

attachments.fallback: Fuse Community: Android-build-tools can't find JDK
attachments.text: Problem with installing android-build-tools on Mac. running java -version returns: java version "22.0.1" 2024-04-16 Java(TM) SE Runtime Environment (build 22.0.1+8-16) Java HotSpot(TM) 64-Bit Server VM (build 22.0.1+8-16, mixed mode, sharing) javac -version returns: javac 22.0.1 Is there any workaround to this? I also install openjdk using brew, temurin and version 21 from Oracle website, but still the same issue. I want to make sure this is resolved before I commit fully to Fuse, coming fr...
attachments.title: Android-build-tools can't find JDK

elements.text:
Hi users.
I need help installing android-build-tools on Mac. It keep saying I need JDK 17 or higher. I have 21, 22 installed. Running javac -version and java -version confirms the installation. I also asked on the forum but it seems it is not very active.
